LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT MAPED HELIX USA, INC.IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Anthony Held's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Maped Helix USA, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Set For Trial On May-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
